data.title: Nuvo raises $34 million to speed up seller onboarding for marketplaces
data.description: U.S.-based platforms like The Grommet, Fairmarkit, and several regional B2B marketplaces use Nuvo to manage these onboarding workflows.

data.title: Lowe’s doubles down on digital marketplace strategy
data.description: Lowe’s is partnering with Mirakl, a France-based software company that provides marketplace infrastructure to leading global retailers.

data.title: Ikea adds new rewards to its Family program
data.description: The new rewards include incentives throughout the Ikea customer purchase journey as it looks to drive signups.

data.title: Cardinal Health expands digital tools to drive growth
data.description: The company attributed much of its progress to new technologies that are improving supply chain efficiency, order fulfillment, and customer engagement.

data.title: Stord acquires UPS’s Ware2Go, expanding fulfillment
data.description: The company recently closed a $200 million equity and debt round, valuing the business at $1.5 billion.
